title: neillia stellata
intro: Neillia stellata, also known as the starry neillia or star neillia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and prevent platelet aggregation. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving circulation. In addition, Neillia stellata has been used to treat various health conditions, including cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
